claims.evidence_text: Recommended dose of fertilizer (120-80-60 kg/ha N-P-K respectively) was applied to each pot.
claims.claim_summary: Recommended nitrogen dose for wheat of 120 kg/ha N.

claims.evidence_text: Recommended dose of fertilizer (120-80-60 kg/ha N-P-K respectively) was applied to each pot.
claims.claim_summary: Recommended phosphorus dose for wheat of 80 kg/ha P.

claims.evidence_text: Recommended dose of fertilizer (120-80-60 kg/ha N-P-K respectively) was applied to each pot.
claims.claim_summary: Recommended potassium dose for wheat of 60 kg/ha K.

claims.evidence_text: The harvest index is one of the most important traits as it links biomass accumulation and grain yield in cereals... already we have reached a plateau in improving harvest index, for further improvement in yield, we must improve biomass.
claims.claim_summary: Wheat harvest index links biomass to grain yield but has reached a plateau, shifting yield-improvement focus to biomass.
